_comment: Sample configuration for customer-specific Private Service Edge ranges.
_instructions: Copy this file to pse-config.json and edit to match your environment.
Add CIDR ranges for any ZIA/ZPA Private Service Edges deployed in China,
or China Premium (CBC/Zenlayer) infrastructure IPs not in the public CENR list.
These are checked as Layer 3 after Zscaler public PSE CIDRs (Layer 1)
and the comprehensive China IP list (Layer 2).
